description: Decree fragment. Only a few words are legible, in large, calligraphic script. There are also a few words in smaller Arabic script in the upper left corner of the fragment, possibly unrelated, but perhaps some kind of filing note. Reused for a Hebrew liturgical text.
description_he: שבר פרמן. רק מספר מילים בולטות, בכתב קליגרפי גדול. שוימש מחדש לטקסט ליטורגי עברי.
